creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
glewis      2007-01-22 17:27:25 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    java/linux-sun-jdk14 Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  . Update to 1.4.2_13.  The distinfo change is the submitters, Makefile and
    pkg-plist is mine. [1]
  . Mark as IGNORE on older versions of FreeBSD due to lack of emulation of
    the necessary syscalls.
  
  PR:             106552 [1]
  Submitted by:   Toshiharu Moriyama [1]
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.59      +6 -2      ports/java/linux-sun-jdk14/Makefile
  1.26      +3 -3      ports/java/linux-sun-jdk14/distinfo
  1.28      +1 -0      ports/java/linux-sun-jdk14/pkg-plist
